# Hammro School

Hammro School is a School Management System developed as a BCA project under Pokhara University. The system is designed to digitize and automate school administrative and academic operations such as student management, attendance tracking, marks management, report generation, and class scheduling.

---

# Features

## Student Management
- Add, update, delete, and search student records
- Store academic and personal information

## Teacher Management
- Manage teacher details and assigned subjects

## Attendance System
- Record daily student attendance
- Generate attendance reports

## Marks & Result Management
- Enter examination marks
- Generate mark sheets and report cards
- Calculate grades automatically

## Authentication System
- Role-based login system
- Secure access control for administrators and staff

## Class & Subject Management
- Manage classes and subjects
- Assign teachers to classes

## Report Generation
- Generate academic reports and summaries
